messages.content:

Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.

message.content: This section functions as a title heading for a report or list. It can answer questions regarding the primary topic (top-performing Chinese-developed mobile applications), the target year (2025), and the market scope (global/international). No specific entities (individual app names), definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, performance metrics, or evidence types are present in this excerpt. Retrieval queries should focus on thematic categorization, temporal scope, and geographic focus.
